goal: 明确 Mainline intent goal 必须可读，避免用上下文依赖引用作为长期记录

summary.title: 明确 Mainline intent goal 必须可读
summary.what: 把 Mainline agent guidance 中关于 `mainline start` 目标文本的规则改为更抽象的长期记录约束：当用户最新指令只是上下文依赖引用时，agent 需要把实际请求扩展成简短、可读、可长期理解的目标，而不是把引用本身作为 `mainline log` 标题。
summary.why: 上一轮工作暴露出 Mainline 自身流程的提示缺口：如果 agent 直接把链接或其它上下文依赖引用写进 intent goal，后续读 `mainline log` 的人无法从长期记录中理解这次变更的目的。这个规则需要写进 skill 和 AGENTS 模板，避免同类低质量 intent 继续进入团队记忆。
summary.user_goal: SKILL.md 是全英文的，你别写中文进去，另外别写这种 case by case 的枚举举例式的 prompt 吧，你抽象一下呢，写不要某一类的就行

anti_patterns.what: Using a context-dependent reference as the `mainline start` goal headline
anti_patterns.why: Mainline intent goals are durable team memory; a headline that only makes sense inside the current chat or a transient external reference is unreadable in future `mainline log` and weakens retrieval quality.

architectural_claims: Mainline intent goal text is durable team memory and must remain human-readable outside the originating chat context.
Skill guidance and generated AGENTS.md guidance should express the same protocol constraint without drifting into separate case-specific rules.
behavioral_changes: Agents are instructed to expand context-dependent user references into concise, human-readable intent goals in the user's language.
Transient references should be preserved in turns or seal references instead of becoming the `mainline log` headline.
